visual_attributes.morphology: stirrup spout vessel with human face
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: 6–45 cm in height, most between 15–30 cm
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: three-dimensional human face with possible fineline paintings

domain_specific_functional.cultural_role: depiction of Moche elite or rulers
domain_specific_functional.ceremonial_use: used in life and placed in graves

relationships.description: The vessel is a product of the Moche culture of Peru.
The vessel often depicts Moche rulers or elite figures.

contextual_attributes.origin: Moche culture, north coast of Peru
contextual_attributes.geographic_range: north coast of Peru, between the Pacific Ocean and the Andean cordillera
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: realistic portrayal of Moche individuals, especially elite
